parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural movements, facial expressions, and lighting. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial features; the app UI elements are standard motion graphics overlays.

characters.appearance: Male, likely in his 30s or 40s, of Asian descent. He has short, textured greyish hair and a light goatee/beard. He has a medium build and a light complexion.
characters.demeanor: Confident, engaging, and expressive. He transitions from a reflective tone to an enthusiastic and celebratory one.

scenes.setting: Dark room, acoustic foam panels on wall, desk with laptop in background

panels.panel_visual_description: A man with short greyish hair and a light beard sits in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a simple black t-shirt. In his left hand, he holds a black smartphone near his chest. The background is dark, featuring acoustic foam panels on the wall behind him. A portion of a desk with a laptop or tablet is visible over his right shoulder. He looks directly into the camera lens, maintaining eye contact as he speaks. His expression is earnest and slightly reflective.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features a man in a dark room speaking directly to the camera. Large, bold text overlays appear dynamically on screen, captioning his speech word-by-word. Several animated app UI elements pop up over the video. These include a pronunciation score of 81% with a sample sentence. Following this, scanning animations for intonation, fluency, and pronunciation appear in sequence. The sequence culminates in a 'Speech Level' chart showing him at 66% Intermediate. The BoldVoice logo is visible at the bottom of this final chart.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I thought my English was really good.
Character A says: But then I did BoldVoice's SpeechScan,
Character A says: and I realized I had a lot to improve on.
scenes.on_screen_text: THIS IS WHAT MY ENGLISH SOUNDED LIKE 90 DAYS AGO... 81% I would love to have dinner with my friends I THOUGHT MY ENGLISH WAS REALLY GOOD BUT THEN I DID BOLDVOICE'S SPEECHSCAN 89% Grading your intonation... 97% Grading your fluency... 100% Grading your pronunciation... AND I REALIZED I HAD A LOT TO IMPROVE ON Your Speech Level Shogo 66% Native Proficient Advanced Intermediate Beginner Novice BoldVoice

scenes.setting: Dark room, acoustic foam panels on wall, desk with laptop in background

panels.panel_visual_description: The man remains seated in the same dark room setting. His attention shifts downwards as he looks intently at the smartphone in his left hand. He brings the phone slightly closer to his face to interact with it. He appears to be speaking into the device, practicing a word. His facial expression shows concentration and focus. Suddenly, his demeanor changes to one of excitement. He smiles broadly and raises his right fist in a small, celebratory gesture.

scenes.visual_description: The man looks down at his phone to practice, and various app UI overlays dominate the screen. We see a word practice interface for 'video' displaying a low score of 46% and a tip about incorrect syllable stress. A subsequent overlay shows a video comparison of a mouth making the 'IH' sound to help him correct his pronunciation. Finally, a success screen appears showing a high score of 97%. A pop-up message from 'Coach Eliza' reads 'Wow, great changes!'. Large text captions continue to appear on screen, mirroring his spoken words and the app's feedback.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man looks back up, re-engaging directly with the camera. He continues to hold the smartphone in his left hand, resting it near his lap. As he speaks, he uses his right hand to make small, expressive gestures to emphasize his points. His posture is relaxed but attentive. The dark background with acoustic foam panels remains consistent. He delivers his final lines with a confident and enthusiastic smile. He maintains strong eye contact until the end of the video.

scenes.visual_description: The man resumes speaking directly to the camera with an enthusiastic tone. An app UI overlay appears, displaying a radar chart that scores his Pronunciation, Intonation, and Fluency. Another overlay shows a pitch contour graph for the word 'flowers', comparing his pitch to a coach's. Large, bold text captions continue to follow his speech word-by-word across the screen. The video concludes with the BoldVoice logo and app icon appearing prominently on screen. He delivers the final call to action with a smile.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Their app showed me specific areas for me to practice,
Character A says: and I only spent 10 minutes before bed doing it.
Character A says: Try BoldVoice for free and see the difference in no time.
